title: City Roads
body:
# 📰 〡 Presentation

**Beautify your roads** with City Roads!
Numerous road markings add realism to your 🏢 **city**.

A crosswalk? It can be done. A zigzag? You can too. A line? double? on a bend? Arrows? Checkerboard? A bus lane? A bike path? It's all possible, and even more.

Whether you’re planning to build an 🌍 **European**-like historic village, or an 🌎 **American**-like megapolis, or any city throughout the 🌐 **world**, City Roads gives you the keys to unlimited creation!

Make your roads more beautiful and turn every road into a piece of 🎨 **urban art**... thanks to this mod available with **Forge**, **NeoForge** and **Fabric**.

![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8711dddc3b22480bb05142d93915a518ce1eeeda.png)

## ✨ 〡 Addons

### [City Roads 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/addon-city-roads-16x)
> The mod is actually uses 32x32 textures. Hower, if you prefer, you can use **16x16 textures** with this **resource pack**.

### [Traffic Signs](https://modrinth.com/mod/traffic-signs)
> Add **even more realism to your roads** with this mod! Road signs allow you to provide information to road users.

## 🌐 〡 Supported languages

- 🇬🇧 English
- 🇫🇷 French / _Français_
